---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## What would you like?

A clear description of the feature or change.

## Why is this useful?

Describe the workflow or use case this enables. The more concrete, the better — "I want to do X when making Y kind of music" is more actionable than "it would be cool if…"

## Are there examples from other trackers?

If a tracker (M8, LSDJ, LGPT, Renoise, etc.) already does something similar, describe how it works there.

## Additional context

Mockups, audio examples, or anything else that helps explain the idea.
